text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 12 

BENE_AGE_CNT 

LABEL: Age as of Date of Admission 

DESCRIPTION: The beneficiary’s age in years on the date of admission 

SHORT NAME: AGE_CNT 

LONG NAME: BENE_AGE_CNT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: NCH 

VALUES: X–XXX 

COMMENT: This field is derived by subtracting the beneficiary's date of birth from the admission date, using the 
first claim record for the stay.
